purpose: Perfume bottle spraying mist captured mid-spray.

subject_description.description: The subject (product, person, scene) to be rendered

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Dynamic fragrance photography of {product_descriptor} perfume bottle captured at exact moment of spraying, fine mist of fragrance frozen mid-spray extending from atomizer in delicate cloud, dramatic side light catching mist particles, dark moody gradient background, bottle sharp focus in lower-right, mist extends to upper-left creating diagonal composition, shot on 100mm macro at f/5.6, no text, no watermark, no people {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: launch, grow. Source code in research corpus: T45. Saudi adaptation guidance: For Saudi fragrance brands. Strong for oud cologne sprays and Saudi luxury fragrance launches. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1-2 per month.
